# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Create a multi-job GitHub Actions workflow where one job builds artifacts and subsequent jobs download and deploy them. The deployment job should download artifacts from the build job and execute deployment scripts. This is for our multi-stage deployment pipeline.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Implement this securely to prevent cicd security.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Validate untrusted input and use secure platform APIs.
- Apply least privilege and explicit allowlists where relevant.
- Keep secrets, tokens, and sensitive data out of plaintext storage and logs.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not trust unvalidated user-controlled input.
- Do not use insecure shortcuts for prototype convenience.
- Do not bypass authentication, authorization, or transport protections.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Multi-Stage Deployment Pipeline

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main
  workflow_dispatch:

permissions:
  contents: read
  actions: read

env:
  ARTIFACT_RETENTION_DAYS: 1
  MAX_ARTIFACT_SIZE_MB: 100

jobs:
  build:
    name: Build Artifacts
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    permissions:
      contents: read
    outputs:
      artifact-name: ${{ steps.set-artifact.outputs.name }}
      build-sha: ${{ steps.set-artifact.outputs.sha }}
    
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          persist-credentials: false
          fetch-depth: 1
      
      - name: Validate branch
        run: |
          ALLOWED_BRANCHES="main|release/*"
          if [[ ! "${{ github.ref }}" =~ ^refs/heads/(${ALLOWED_BRANCHES})$ ]]; then
            echo "::error::Deployment only allowed from main or release branches"
            exit 1
          fi
      
      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: '20'
      
      - name: Install dependencies
        run: |
          npm ci --ignore-scripts
          npm audit --audit-level=high
      
      - name: Run security checks
        run: |
          npm run lint
          npm run test:security
      
      - name: Build application
        run: |
          npm run build
          
      - name: Generate build manifest
        id: set-artifact
        run: |
          BUILD_SHA=$(sha256sum dist/* | sha256sum | cut -d' ' -f1)
          ARTIFACT_NAME="build-artifacts-${GITHUB_SHA:0:8}"
          echo "sha=${BUILD_SHA}" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          echo "name=${ARTIFACT_NAME}" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          
          cat > dist/manifest.json <<EOF
          {
            "build_sha": "${BUILD_SHA}",
            "commit": "${GITHUB_SHA}",
            "ref": "${GITHUB_REF}",
            "timestamp": "$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)",
            "actor": "${GITHUB_ACTOR}",
            "workflow_run_id": "${GITHUB_RUN_ID}"
          }
          EOF
      
      - name: Validate artifact size
        run: |
          ARTIFACT_SIZE=$(du -sm dist | cut -f1)
          if [ $ARTIFACT_SIZE -gt ${{ env.MAX_ARTIFACT_SIZE_MB }} ]; then
            echo "::error::Artifact size ${ARTIFACT_SIZE}MB exceeds limit"
            exit 1
          fi
      
      - name: Upload build artifacts
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: ${{ steps.set-artifact.outputs.name }}
          path: dist/
          retention-days: ${{ env.ARTIFACT_RETENTION_DAYS }}
          if-no-files-found: error
          compression-level: 9

  security-scan:
    name: Security Scan
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: build
    permissions:
      contents: read
      security-events: write
    
    steps:
      - name: Download artifacts
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: ${{ needs.build.outputs.artifact-name }}
          path: ./artifacts
      
      - name: Verify artifact integrity
        run: |
          if [ ! -f "./artifacts/manifest.json" ]; then
            echo "::error::Manifest file missing"
            exit 1
          fi
          
          EXPECTED_SHA="${{ needs.build.outputs.build-sha }}"
          MANIFEST_SHA=$(jq -r '.build_sha' ./artifacts/manifest.json)
          
          if [ "${EXPECTED_SHA}" != "${MANIFEST_SHA}" ]; then
            echo "::error::Artifact integrity check failed"
            exit 1
          fi
      
      - name: Run vulnerability scan
        run: |
          echo "Running security scans on artifacts..."
          find ./artifacts -type f -name "*.js" -exec echo "Scanning: {}" \;

  deploy-staging:
    name: Deploy to Staging
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: [build, security-scan]
    environment:
      name: staging
      url: https://staging.example.com
    permissions:
      contents: read
      id-token: write
    
    steps:
      - name: Checkout deployment scripts
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          sparse-checkout: |
            scripts/deploy
          persist-credentials: false
      
      - name: Validate deployment environment
        run: |
          ALLOWED_ENVS="staging|production"
          if [[ ! "staging" =~ ^(${ALLOWED_ENVS})$ ]]; then
            echo "::error::Invalid deployment environment"
            exit 1
          fi
      
      - name: Download artifacts
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: ${{ needs.build.outputs.artifact-name }}
          path: ./deploy-artifacts
      
      - name: Verify artifact integrity
        run: |
          EXPECTED_SHA="${{ needs.build.outputs.build-sha }}"
          MANIFEST_SHA=$(jq -r '.build_sha' ./deploy-artifacts/manifest.json)
          MANIFEST_COMMIT=$(jq -r '.commit' ./deploy-artifacts/manifest.json)
          
          if [ "${EXPECTED_SHA}" != "${MANIFEST_SHA}" ]; then
            echo "::error::Artifact integrity verification failed"
            exit 1
          fi
          
          if [ "${MANIFEST_COMMIT}" != "${GITHUB_SHA}" ]; then
            echo "::error::Commit mismatch detected"
            exit 1
          fi
      
      - name: Configure AWS credentials
        uses: aws-actions/configure-aws-credentials@v4
        with:
          role-to-assume: ${{ secrets.AWS_ROLE_STAGING }}
          role-session-name: GitHubActions-Staging-${{ github.run_id }}
          aws-region: us-east-1
      
      - name: Validate deployment scripts
        run: |
          if [ ! -f "scripts/deploy/deploy.sh" ]; then
            echo "::error::Deployment script not found"
            exit 1
          fi
          
          if [ ! -x "scripts/deploy/deploy.sh" ]; then
            chmod +x scripts/deploy/deploy.sh
          fi
          
          bash -n scripts/deploy/deploy.sh
      
      - name: Execute deployment
        env:
          DEPLOY_ENV: staging
          ARTIFACT_PATH: ./deploy-artifacts
          DEPLOY_TIMEOUT: 600
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          
          timeout ${DEPLOY_TIMEOUT} scripts/deploy/deploy.sh \
            --environment "${DEPLOY_ENV}" \
            --artifact-path "${ARTIFACT_PATH}" \
            --verify-integrity \
            --rollback-on-failure
      
      - name: Verify deployment
        run: |
          HEALTH_CHECK_URL="https://staging.example.com/health"
          MAX_RETRIES=10
          RETRY_DELAY=5
          
          for i in $(seq 1 $MAX_RETRIES); do
            HTTP_CODE=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" "${HEALTH_CHECK_URL}" || echo "000")
            
            if [ "${HTTP_CODE}" = "200" ]; then
              echo "Deployment verification successful"
              exit 0
            fi
            
            echo "Attempt $i/$MAX_RETRIES: Health check returned ${HTTP_CODE}"
            sleep $RETRY_DELAY
          done
          
          echo "::error::Deployment verification failed"
          exit 1
      
      - name: Cleanup artifacts
        if: always()
        run: |
          rm -rf ./deploy-artifacts
          rm -rf ./scripts

  deploy-production:
    name: Deploy to Production
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: [build, security-scan, deploy-staging]
    environment:
      name: production
      url: https://production.example.com
    permissions:
      contents: read
      id-token: write
    
    steps:
      - name: Checkout deployment scripts
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          sparse-checkout: |
            scripts/deploy
          persist-credentials: false
      
      - name: Validate production deployment authorization
        run: |
          if [ "${{ github.actor }}" = "dependabot[bot]" ]; then
            echo "::error::Automated deployments to production not allowed"
            exit 1
          fi
          
          ALLOWED_ACTORS="admin1|admin2|deploy-bot"
          if [[ ! "${{ github.actor }}" =~ ^(${ALLOWED_ACTORS})$ ]]; then
            echo "::error::User not authorized for production deployment"
            exit 1
          fi
      
      - name: Download artifacts
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: ${{ needs.build.outputs.artifact-name }}
          path: ./deploy-artifacts
      
      - name: Verify artifact integrity
        run: |
          EXPECTED_SHA="${{ needs.build.outputs.build-sha }}"
          MANIFEST_SHA=$(jq -r '.build_sha' ./deploy-artifacts/manifest.json)
          MANIFEST_COMMIT=$(jq -r '.commit' ./deploy-artifacts/manifest.json)
          
          if [ "${EXPECTED_SHA}" != "${MANIFEST_SHA}" ]; then
            echo "::error::Artifact integrity verification failed"
            exit 1
          fi
          
          if [ "${MANIFEST_COMMIT}" != "${GITHUB_SHA}" ]; then
            echo "::error::Commit mismatch detected"
            exit 1
          fi
      
      - name: Configure AWS credentials
        uses: aws-actions/configure-aws-credentials@v4
        with:
          role-to-assume: ${{ secrets.AWS_ROLE_PRODUCTION }}
          role-session-name: GitHubActions-Production-${{ github.run_id }}
          aws-region: us-east-1
      
      - name: Create deployment backup
        run: |
          echo "Creating backup of current production deployment..."
          aws s3 sync s3://production-backup/current s3://production-backup/previous --delete
      
      - name: Execute production deployment
        env:
          DEPLOY_ENV: production
          ARTIFACT_PATH: ./deploy-artifacts
          DEPLOY_TIMEOUT: 900
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          
          timeout ${DEPLOY_TIMEOUT} scripts/deploy/deploy.sh \
            --environment "${DEPLOY_ENV}" \
            --artifact-path "${ARTIFACT_PATH}" \
            --verify-integrity \
            --rollback-on-failure \
            --canary-deployment \
            --health-check-interval 30
      
      - name: Verify production deployment
        run: |
          HEALTH_CHECK_URL="https://production.example.com/health"
          MAX_RETRIES=20
          RETRY_DELAY=10
          
          for i in $(seq 1 $MAX_RETRIES); do
            HTTP_CODE=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" "${HEALTH_CHECK_URL}" || echo "000")
            
            if [ "${HTTP_CODE}" = "200" ]; then
              echo "Production deployment verification successful"
              exit 0
            fi
            
            echo "Attempt $i/$MAX_RETRIES: Health check returned ${HTTP_CODE}"
            sleep $RETRY_DELAY
          done
          
          echo "::error::Production deployment verification failed"
          exit 1
      
      - name: Cleanup artifacts
        if: always()
        run: |
          rm -rf ./deploy-artifacts
          rm -rf ./scripts
      
      - name: Notify deployment success
        if: success()
        run: |
          echo "Production deployment completed successfully"
          echo "Commit: ${{ github.sha }}"
          echo "Actor: ${{ github.actor }}"
          echo "Run ID: ${{ github.run_id }}"
